case_title: MARIA CARITINA GUADALUPE CENTENO VS. ESOTERIC GROUP INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTENO, MARIA CARITINA GUADALUPE AS TO DEFENDANT ESOTERIC GROUP INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA C&C MAINTENANCE SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENTENO, MARIA CARITINA GUADALUPE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESOTERIC GROUP INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA C&C MAINTENANCE SERVICES $1,640.54 PRINCIPAL, $2.16 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,822.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
